message:
style: cargo fmt and clippy fixes across 34 frankenterm-core modules

Applied cargo fmt and resolved clippy warnings across test code in 34
source files. These changes are formatting-only with no behavioral
modifications — they clean up drift introduced by the wa-1u90p.7.1
test expansion campaign where new test code was added without a
subsequent formatting pass.

Predominant patterns fixed:
- Long single-line assert! and assert_eq! calls broken into multi-line
  format for readability (approval.rs, causal_dag.rs, config.rs,
  crash.rs, degradation.rs, patterns.rs, recorder_storage.rs,
  telemetry.rs, docs_gen.rs, pane_lifecycle.rs, policy.rs,
  search_explain.rs, survival.rs, tailer.rs, email_notify.rs,
  cross_pane_correlation.rs, tantivy_quality.rs, user_preferences.rs).
- Implicit format captures in prop_assert! and assert! macros replaced
  with explicit positional arguments per Rust 2024 edition requirements
  (diagnostic.rs, screen_state.rs, suggestions.rs, tantivy_ingest.rs).
- Simplified/deduplicated test helper code (bocpd.rs, native_events.rs,
  plan.rs, recorder_replay.rs, resize_scheduler.rs, tui/rollout.rs,
  undo.rs, workflows.rs — net line reductions from removing redundant
  assertions and consolidating repeated patterns).
- Minor clippy lint fixes: unnecessary clones removed, match arms
  simplified, redundant type annotations cleaned up (learn.rs, mcp.rs,
  dry_run.rs, cleanup.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
